zh.lifeSummary: Alice Whitney於大約1466年出生在英國英格蘭爾希 萊。她於1501年與Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾塔爾加斯享年38歲。

en.West Hall, High Legh, Cheshire, England: High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Whitney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitney in Herefordshire, the etymology of which is uncertain. The second element is Old English ēg ‘island, piece of higher ground in a low-lying area’; the first appears to be hwītan, which is either the genitive singular of an Old English byname Hwīta (meaning ‘white’), or the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of the adjective hwīt ‘white’. The name may also derive from Whitney (now Whitney Wood) in Stevenage (Hertfordshire), probably named from Old English hwītan ‘white’ + (ge)hæge ‘enclosure’.
History: John Whitney came from London, England, to Watertown, MA, in 1635, and had numerous prominent descendents.

variants.name: Witney
meanings: English: habitational name from Witney in Oxfordshire, which for centuries was a centre of the wool trade, famous in particular for the manufacture of blankets. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Witta (genitive Wittan) + Old English ēg, īeg ‘island’. There may have been some confusion with Whitney .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Whitney was born about 1466, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham in 1501, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1503, in Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Whitneyは約1466年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグで生まれた。1501年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードでLord Hamon Massey of Dunhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアタルガースで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Whitney(은)는 대략 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히그h 레그h에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 탤가스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Whitney родилась около 1466 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham в 1501 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1503 г. в местности талгарт, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
